data.title: Virtu Financial to report Q4 results on Jan 29, 2026. Leading provider of financial services. #NYSE:VIRT
data.description: Virtu Financial, Inc. (NYSE:VIRT), a prominent provider of global financial services offering liquidity and transparent products throughout the investment cycle, is set to release its Q4 2025 results on January 29, 2026, before the US market opens. This information was shared on January 14, 2026.

data.title: Minerals Technologies Inc. expands with 4 new sites and doubled capacity in India; 50% dedicated to packaging in Asia.
data.description: China and India have recently launched four new paper and packaging satellites, with an additional site in India seeing its capacity doubled. These expansions have been significant, with 50% of the growth focused on packaging applications. This move highlights the growing demand for paper and packaging solutions in these regions, showcasing a commitment to meet the needs of consumers and industries.

data.title: INJ to hit $6.20 in Feb with short-term target at $5.80-$6.03 & medium-term forecast $5.80-$6.50. Breakout level at $6.03, support at $5.35.
data.description: The forecast for INJ prices indicates a short-term target of $5.80 to $6.03 within a week, while the medium-term prediction for the next month is in the range of $5.80 to $6.50. The bullish breakout level is set at $6.03, while the critical support level stands at $5.35.

data.title: Honeywell stock rises post-Quantinuum IPO filing; Quantum unit to submit draft to SEC, no share count disclosed.
data.description: Honeywell International Inc. saw a rise in its stock on Wednesday following reports that its majority-owned quantum subsidiary, Quantinuum LLC, is progressing towards a potential public offering. The company also announced a new AI retail initiative in collaboration with Google Cloud. Honeywell's aerospace and automation division revealed that Quantinuum intends to confidentially submit draft IPO documents to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. Although specific details such as the share count and expected price range have not been disclosed by Honeywell, Quantinuum plans to file a draft registration statement for the IPO. The company highlighted that the timing of the offering will be contingent upon market conditions. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: HNTB Corporation announces key leadership changes to enhance collaboration and value delivered to clients.
data.description: HNTB Corporation has recently expanded, with significant changes being implemented to bolster cooperation and improve the services provided to clients. On January 14, 2026, in Kansas City, Missouri, the company unveiled multiple leadership adjustments aimed at enhancing cross-functional collaboration to better serve clients. These changes are expected to enhance the overall value delivered to clients, solidifying HNTB's position as a leading provider in the industry.

data.title: Jeff Wyler Automotive Family buys Midwest Auto Group, creating The Wyler Collection. JWAF now one of the largest auto groups in the US.
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, on January 14, 2026, the Jeff Wyler Automotive Family (JWAF), a leading privately owned automotive group in the US, disclosed the purchase of Midwest Auto Group (MAG), marking a notable advancement in JWAF's expansion plans. This acquisition positions JWAF as a key player in the industry, consolidating its position within the market. The deal underscores JWAF's commitment to increasing its presence and influence in the automotive sector.

data.title: UnitedHealth launching pilot program to speed up Medicare Advantage payments for rural hospitals, aiming to cut payment collection times by 50% from <30 days to <15 days. Will provide immediate relief to rural hospitals in states like Oklahoma, Idaho, Minnesota, and Missouri. CEO Bobby Hunter aims to support the sustainability of critical facilities. Insights will guide potential expansions to more hospitals and markets.
data.description: UnitedHealth Group Incorporated announced a new pilot program, the Rural Payment Acceleration Pilot, to speed up Medicare Advantage payments for rural hospitals. The initiative aims to cut payment collection times in half for rural hospitals, reducing it from under 30 days to under 15 days. This program, set to run for six months, will offer immediate relief in cash flow to independent rural hospitals in states such as Oklahoma, Idaho, Minnesota, and Missouri. The objective is to provide support to ensure the viability of these crucial facilities, according to UnitedHealthcare Government Programs CEO Bobby Hunter. Results from this pilot will inform possible extensions to more hospitals and markets, refining strategies to enhance the stability of rural healthcare.

data.title: Royal Cup Coffee and Tea introduces new flavors to Ready-to-Drink Cold Brew line amid major expansion.
data.description: In a recent press release on January 14, 2026, Royal Cup Coffee and Tea, a prominent company in the production and distribution of high-quality coffee and tea, revealed plans for a significant expansion of its Ready-to-Drink (RTD) Cold Brew product line. This expansion comes following the positive reception of its Signature Cold Brew Sweet Latte. Based in Birmingham, Alabama, the company aims to capitalize on the growing popularity of cold brew beverages.

data.title: LightHouse Data Centers and Wharton Digital partner to launch a new platform delivering over 2 GW of capacity for hyperscale customers. Led by ex-Amazon Web Services execs.
data.description: Two ex-Senior Executives from Amazon Web Services have kicked off a new platform aimed at filling the gap in data center supply for hyperscale, AI, and cloud clients. The platform called LightHouse Data Centers has been launched in New York on Jan. 14, 2026. It promises to cater to the increasing demands of organizations, offering turnkey data center solutions.

data.title: Color Me Mine ranked first in Entrepreneur Franchise 500®, showing growth in 2025, leading in DIY/Paint-&-Sip category.
data.description: In 2025, Color Me Mine, a popular paint-your-own pottery franchise, demonstrated significant growth by becoming the top DIY/Paint-&-Sip Studio in Entrepreneur's 2026 Franchise 500® rankings. This New Orleans-based brand is at the forefront of the industry, showcasing its success and leadership. This accomplishment reflects the increasing popularity of DIY activities and art-related experiences among consumers. Color Me Mine's achievement highlights its strong performance and market position, underscoring its strategic approach and appeal to customers. This recognition solidifies its position as a key player within the thriving paint-your-own pottery sector.

data.title: Crossmint platform gains MiCA authorization from CNMV in EU, strengthening digital asset infrastructure.
data.description: In a recent announcement made on January 14, 2026, Crossmint revealed that it has successfully obtained MiCA authorization from the Comisión Nacional del Mercado de Valores (CNMV). This achievement signifies a significant milestone for the platform, as it moves towards becoming a regulated entity. Crossmint, known for its comprehensive digital asset and wallet infrastructure services, is now poised to operate under the regulatory oversight of the CNMV. This development underscores the platform's commitment to compliance and transparency in the increasingly important digital asset industry.

data.title: BankPro partners with McLaren United Autosports for FIA WEC, boosting Racing's endurance ambitions.
data.description: In Nassau, Bahamas on January 14, 2026, BankPro revealed a new partnership with Racing's endurance goals by teaming up with the McLaren United Autosports WEC Hyper Team, the official entry of McLaren Racing in the FIA World Endurance Championship (WEC). This collaboration signifies a significant step forward for both entities as they join forces to achieve success in the competitive world of endurance racing.
